metadata.description: Interactive directed graph viewer for Tercen workflows. Displays steps as shaped nodes (rounded rects, circles, hexagons) with elbow connectors, state-colored icons, zoom/pan, and selection with path highlighting. Publishes selection events when steps are clicked.

workflowId.description: Workflow ID. If omitted, prompts user.

metadata.description: Tabular data viewer for Tercen workflow step tables. Fetches input or output tables for a step and displays them in browser-style tabs. Each tab shows a scrollable data table with column headers, types, and selectable cell values.

workflowId.description: Workflow ID. If omitted, prompts user.

stepId.description: Step ID within the workflow. If omitted, prompts user.

tableType.description: Whether to show input or output tables for the step.

metadata.description: LLM chat interface for Tercen. Displays a message thread with markdown-rich responses, syntax-highlighted code blocks, and streaming indicators. Sends user messages to the LLM via WebSocket and emits action intents on the EventBus.

props.text: Ask a question or give an instruction

metadata.description: Document viewer for Tercen files. Fetches file metadata (name, owner, size, dates) and downloads file content as selectable text. If fileId is not provided, prompts the user.

fileId.description: Tercen file ID to view. If omitted, prompts user.

metadata.description: File browser for a Tercen project. Lists project documents (files, schemas, workflows) with selection support.

projectId.description: Project ID to browse. If omitted, prompts user.

metadata.description: Compliance and regulatory log review tool for Tercen. Displays a unified timeline of platform activity events (object creation, modification, deletion, workflow execution) with resizable columns, sortable headers, column-level filters, and date-range filtering. Supports detail panel inspection, multi-select with send-to-Chat for hallucination checking, CSV export, and EventBus-driven scope control.

props.text: Select a scope to view audit events

metadata.description: Image viewer for Tercen workflow step outputs. Fetches generated images (PNG, SVG) from a step's computed results and displays them with zoom/pan. Multiple images shown in browser-style tabs.

workflowId.description: Workflow ID. If omitted, prompts user.

stepId.description: Step ID within the workflow. If omitted, prompts user.

metadata.description: Personalized landing dashboard for Tercen. Displays a four-card responsive grid: Recent Projects, Featured Apps, Help & Documentation, and Recent Activity. Toolbar provides quick actions (New Project, Teams, Audit). Cards load data independently via DataSource service calls. Publishes navigation intents on window.intent channel.

Frame-level chrome bar for Tercen. 36px fixed height. Brand mark with theme-aware logo on the left (PNG, light/dark variants). User identicon avatar and dropdown menu on the right with actions: About, Save Layout, Theme Toggle, LLM Settings, Task Manager, Admin (admin-only), Sign Out. Publishes all actions to header.intent channel.

Live task monitor showing running and recently completed tasks. Polls the Tercen task service and subscribes to event channels for real-time progress. Displays workflow name, project, step, elapsed time, and status. Supports cancelling running tasks.
Team management widget for viewing and editing team members, roles, and settings.

teamId.description: Team ID. If omitted, shows placeholder.

metadata.description: Lists recent user activity with timestamp
Dashboard card showing project count and list
Form to create a new project
